requests.take_off_intransitive: pattern {%0A  V [lemma="take", upos="VERB"];%0A  OFF [form=/^off$/i, upos=/^(PART|ADV)$/];%0A  V -[compound:prt|advmod]-> OFF;%0A%0A}%0A%0Awithout { V -[obj]-> _; }%0A%0A
requests.adjunct_base: pattern {%0A  H [upos=VERB]|[upos=ADJ];%0A  A [upos=VERB, VerbForm=Part, Tense=Pres];%0A  H -[advcl]-> A;%0A}
requests.general_past_plurals: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Fin", Tense="Past"];%0A  V -[nsubj]-> S;%0A  S [];%0A  S [Number="Plur"];%0A}%0A
requests.ditransitive_obj_inf: pattern {%0A  V   [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  S   [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  R   [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  INF [upos="VERB"];%0A%0A  % soggetto della main clause%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  % oggetto (recipient/affected argument)%0A  V -[obj]-> R;%0A%0A  % xcomp (bare infinitive)%0A  V -[xcomp]-> INF;%0A}%0A%0A% bare infinitive: niente "to"%0Awithout {%0A  TO [lemma="to"];%0A  INF -[mark]-> TO;%0A}
requests.mass_np: pattern {%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number="Sing"];%0A}%0A%0A% niente determinanti%0Awithout { N -[det|det:poss]-> D; D []; }%0A%0A% niente numerali%0Awithout { N -[nummod]-> Q; Q []; }%0A%0A% niente possessori/genitivo%0Awithout { N -[nmod:poss]-> P; P []; }%0A%0A% IMPORTANT: N non deve essere un modificatore nominale/aggettivale di un altro nome%0Awithout { H [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"]; H -[compound|amod]-> N; }%0Awithout { H [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"]; H -[nmod]-> N; }%0Awithout { H []; H -[flat|name]-> N; }%0A% se N è un congiunto e il head della coord ha un determinante, allora NON è bare%0Awithout {%0A  H [];%0A  H -[conj]-> N;%0A  H -[det|det:poss]-> D;%0A  D [];%0A}
requests.impersonal_evaluative: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  ADJ [upos="ADJ"];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> ADJ;%0A%0A  IT [lemma="it", upos="PRON"];%0A  ADJ -[nsubj]-> IT;%0A%0A  BE [lemma="be", upos="AUX"];%0A  ADJ -[cop]-> BE;%0A%0A  INF [upos="VERB", VerbForm=Inf];%0A  ADJ -[xcomp]-> INF;%0A%0A  TO [lemma="to", upos="PART"];%0A  INF -[mark]-> TO;%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  ADJ -[ccomp]-> C;%0A}
requests.asyndetic_coordination: pattern {%0A  H [];%0A  C1 [];%0A  H -[conj]-> C1;%0A%0A  P1 [upos="PUNCT", form=","];%0A  H -[punct]-> P1;%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  CC [];%0A  H -[cc]-> CC;%0A}
requests.demonstrative_singular: pattern {%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number="Sing"];%0A  D [upos="DET", lemma="this"|"that"];%0A%0A  N -[det]-> D;%0A}
requests.attribute_construction_adj: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A  O [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];%0A  A [upos="ADJ"];%0A%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A  V -[xcomp]-> A;%0A}
requests.general_past_tense_you: %0A  pattern {%0A    V [upos="VERB"|"AUX", Tense="Past"];%0A    S [upos="PRON", lemma="you"];%0A    V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A  }%0A
requests.perfective_construction: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Part"];%0A  H [lemma="have", upos=/^(AUX|VERB)$/];%0A%0A  V -[aux]-> H;%0A}
requests.wh-cleft: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  H [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON|ADJ|ADV|VERB)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> H;%0A%0A  BE [lemma="be", upos="AUX"];%0A  H -[cop]-> BE;%0A%0A  % testa della wh-clause: deve essere FINITA%0A  C [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/, VerbForm="Fin"];%0A  H -[csubj]-> C;%0A%0A  WH [lemma=/^(what|which|who|whom|whose|where|when|why|how)$/];%0A  C -[obj|iobj|obl|advmod|nsubj|nmod]-> WH;%0A}
requests.adjectival_with_partner_base: pattern {%0A  A [upos="ADJ"];%0A  P [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  W [upos="ADP", form="with"];%0A%0A  A -[obl]-> P;%0A  P -[case]-> W;%0A}
requests.left_dislocation: pattern {%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A%0A  TOP [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[dislocated]-> TOP;%0A%0A  PRO [upos="PRON", PronType="Prs"];%0A  V -[nsubj|obj|iobj|obl]-> PRO;%0A}
requests.we_are_able_to_make: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  R [];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> R;%0A%0A  % soggetto%0A  S [];%0A  R -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  % copula BE: può essere head (VERB) oppure aux (AUX) a seconda dell’analisi%0A  BE [lemma="be", upos=/^(AUX|VERB)$/];%0A%0A  % caso A: head = aggettivo, BE = copula (cop)%0A  ADJ [upos="ADJ", lemma=/^(able|unable|ready|entitled|ideal|infitted|qualified|unsuitable|well-positioned)$/];%0A  ADJ -[cop]-> BE;%0A%0A  % infinito con "to"%0A  VINF [upos="VERB"];%0A  ADJ -[xcomp]-> VINF;%0A  TO [form="to"];%0A  VINF -[mark]-> TO;%0A}
requests.to_recipient_about: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  RECIP [];%0A  TOPIC  [];%0A%0A  V -[obl|iobj|nmod]-> RECIP;%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> TOPIC;%0A%0A  TO    [form="to"];%0A  ABOUT [form="about"];%0A%0A  RECIP -[case|mark]-> TO;%0A  TOPIC -[case|mark]-> ABOUT;%0A}
requests.the_cardinal_of_pron: pattern {%0A  N [upos="NUM", form=/^(two|three|four|five)$/];%0A%0A  PRON [upos="PRON", form=/^(them|us|you)$/];%0A  OF [upos="ADP", form="of"];%0A  PRON -[case]-> OF;%0A%0A  N -[nmod|nmod:of]-> PRON;%0A}
requests.definite_singular: pattern {%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number="Sing"];%0A  D [lemma="the"];%0A  N -[det]-> D;%0A}
requests.valency_postmodifier: pattern {%0A  % head noun%0A  N [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"];%0A%0A  % postmodifier head (usually NOUN/PROPN/PRON in PP)%0A  P [upos];%0A%0A  % preposition (case marker)%0A  C [upos="ADP"];%0A%0A  % allow both nmod and obl as in your python%0A  N -[nmod|obl]-> P;%0A  P -[case]-> C;%0A}
requests.general_quantifier_singular: pattern {%0A  Q [upos="DET", lemma="every"|"no"|"any"|"each"];%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number="Sing"];%0A  N -[det]-> Q;%0A}
requests.we_definite_reference: pattern {%0A  W [upos="PRON", lemma="we"];%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> W;%0A}
requests.most_least: pattern {%0A  A [upos="ADJ"];%0A  ADV [upos="ADV", lemma=/^(most|least)$/i, Degree="Sup"];%0A  A -[advmod]-> ADV;%0A}
requests.general_present_tense: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX", VerbForm="Fin", Tense="Pres"];%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  V [Person="3", Number="Sing"];%0A}
requests.negative_imperative: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Fin"];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  % negazione (not / n't) come dipendente del verbo (advmod)%0A  NEG [lemma="not"];%0A  V -[advmod]-> NEG;%0A}%0A%0A% escludi frasi con soggetto espresso (quindi non-imperativi)%0Awithout {%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass|csubj|expl]-> _;%0A}
requests.intransitive: pattern {%0A  % main predicate%0A  V [upos="VERB"];%0A%0A  % subject%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A}%0A%0A% exclude direct object%0Awithout {%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A  O [];%0A}%0A%0A% exclude indirect object%0Awithout {%0A  V -[iobj]-> I;%0A  I [];%0A}%0A%0A% exclude clausal complements (control/raising etc.)%0Awithout {%0A  V -[xcomp|ccomp]-> C;%0A  C [];%0A}
requests.postmodifier_pp_base: pattern {%0A  N [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"];%0A  P [upos];%0A  C [upos="ADP"];%0A  N -[nmod]-> P;%0A  P -[case]-> C;%0A}
requests.themselves_reflexive: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  SELF [lemma="themselves"];%0A  V -[obj|iobj|obl|nmod]-> SELF;%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass|csubj|csubj:pass]-> SELF;%0A}
requests.with_partner: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A  S [];%0A  P [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];%0A  C [upos="ADP", lemma="with"];%0A%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> P;%0A  P -[case]-> C;%0A}
requests.myself_reflexive: pattern {%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  V -[nsubj]-> S;%0A%0A  REFL [form=/^myself$/i, upos="PRON"];%0A  V -[obj|iobj|obl]-> REFL;%0A}
requests.superlative: pattern {%0A  A [upos="ADJ"];%0A  N [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"];%0A  N -[amod]-> A;%0A%0A  A.Degree = "Sup";%0A}
requests.comparative_than: pattern {%0A  H [upos=/^(ADJ|ADV)$/];                  % testa comparata%0A  COMP [];                                 % termine di confronto%0A  TH [lemma="than", upos="ADP"];           % than%0A%0A  H -[obl|nmod]-> COMP;%0A  COMP -[case]-> TH;%0A%0A  MORE [lemma=/^(more|less)$/ , upos=/^(ADV|ADJ)$/];%0A  H -[advmod]-> MORE;%0A}
requests.affirmative_tag: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  MAIN [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> MAIN;%0A%0A  TAGV [upos="AUX"];%0A  MAIN -[parataxis|discourse|conj]-> TAGV;%0A%0A  TAGS [upos="PRON"];%0A  TAGV -[nsubj]-> TAGS;%0A%0A  Q [form="?"];%0A  TAGV -[punct]-> Q;%0A}
requests.object_attribute: pattern {%0A  % predicate%0A  V [upos="VERB", lemma="account"|"appoint"|"call"|"consider"|"count"|"create"|"declare"|"elect"|"excuse"|"find"|"imagine"|"judge"|"keep"|"label"|"leave"|"make"|"pronounce"|"prove"|"show"|"take"|"think"|"vote"];%0A%0A  % subject (affector)%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  % object (affected-attributee)%0A  O [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A%0A  % attribute as NP complement (object complement)%0A  A [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];%0A  V -[xcomp]-> A;%0A}%0A%0A% optional: avoid cases where A is a clause head (keep it NP-ish)%0Awithout {%0A  A [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A}
requests.us_definite_reference: pattern {%0A  U [upos="PRON", lemma="we"];%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  V [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> U;%0A}
requests.to_recipient_for: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/, lemma=/^(answer|account)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  RECIP [];%0A  V -[obl|iobj|nmod]-> RECIP;%0A  TO [lemma="to"];%0A  RECIP -[case|mark]-> TO;%0A%0A  FACT [];%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> FACT;%0A  FOR [lemma="for"];%0A  FACT -[case|mark]-> FOR;%0A}
requests.it_that: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  PRED [upos=/^(ADJ|NOUN|PROPN)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> PRED;%0A%0A  IT [lemma="it"];%0A  PRED -[nsubj]-> IT;%0A%0A  BE [lemma=/^(be)$/];%0A  PRED -[cop]-> BE;%0A%0A  C [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  PRED -[ccomp]-> C;%0A%0A  M [lemma=/^(that|if|whether)$/];%0A  C -[mark]-> M;%0A}
requests.me_definite: pattern {%0A  M [upos="PRON", lemma="me"];%0A}%0A%0A% escludi i casi in cui "me" è soggetto (nsubj / nsubj:pass)%0Awithout {%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> M;%0A}%0A%0A% (opzionale) escludi interrogative con "?"%0Awithout { Q [form="?"]; M -[punct]-> Q; }
requests.additive_coordination_base: pattern {%0A  H  [];%0A  C  [];%0A  AND [upos="CCONJ", lemma="and"];%0A%0A  H -[conj]-> C;%0A  C -[cc]-> AND;%0A}
requests.them_definite_reference: pattern {%0A  T [upos="PRON", form="them"];%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  V [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> T;%0A}
requests.monotransitive_clausal_objects: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  C [upos="VERB"|"AUX"|"ADJ"|"NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];%0A  V -[ccomp|xcomp]-> C;%0A}
requests.caused_motion: pattern {%0A  % ---------- slots ----------%0A  S [];%0A  V [upos="VERB",%0A     lemma="put"|"place"|"set"|"move"|"bring"|"take"|"send"|"carry"|"lead"|"drive"|"push"|"pull"|"throw"|"kick"|"boot"|"drop"|"lift"|"drag"|"dump"|"pack"|"ship"|"transfer"];%0A%0A  O [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];   % ÆFFECTED-THEME (direct object)%0A%0A  P [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];   % head del PP (obl/nmod)%0A  C [upos="ADP",%0A     lemma="to"|"into"|"onto"|"towards"|"toward"|"from"|"through"|"across"|"around"|"over"|"under"|"out"|"off"];%0A%0A  % ---------- dependencies ----------%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A%0A  % PP goal/source/path (UD: obl o talvolta nmod)%0A  V -[obl|obl:npmod|nmod]-> P;%0A  P -[case]-> C;%0A}%0A%0A% (optional but useful) elimina i casi “strumentali/role” tipo "as ..."%0Awithout {%0A  C [lemma="as"];%0A}
requests.adjective_base: pattern {%0A  N [upos = NOUN|PROPN];%0A  A [upos = ADJ];%0A  N -[amod]-> A;%0A}
requests.to_recipient_for_desired: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB"];%0A  S [];%0A  R [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];   % recipient head (to-PP)%0A  D [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];   % desired-object head (for-PP)%0A  TO  [upos="ADP", lemma="to"];%0A  FOR [upos="ADP", lemma="for"];%0A%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> R;%0A  R -[case]-> TO;%0A%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> D;%0A  D -[case]-> FOR;%0A}
requests.on_focus_area: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj]-> S;%0A%0A  P [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];%0A  V -[obl]-> P;%0A%0A  C [upos="ADP", lemma="on"];%0A  P -[case]-> C;%0A}%0A%0Awithout { V -[aux:pass]-> AUXP; }%0Awithout { V -[nsubj:pass]-> SPASS; }
requests.to_recipient_goal: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  S [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  R [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> R;%0A%0A  TO [upos="ADP", lemma="to"];%0A  R -[case]-> TO;%0A}%0A%0Awithout { Q [form="?"]; V -[punct]-> Q; }%0A%0A% evita range marker "from ... to ..."%0Awithout {%0A  FROM [upos="ADP", lemma="from"];%0A}
requests.she_was_surprised_to_hear: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  R [];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> R;%0A%0A  % soggetto%0A  S [];%0A  R -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  % aggettivo valutativo%0A  ADJ [upos="ADJ", lemma=/^(happy|pleased|delighted|glad|surprised|proud)$/];%0A%0A  % copula "be" come cop%0A  BE [lemma="be", upos=/^(AUX|VERB)$/];%0A  ADJ -[cop]-> BE;%0A%0A  % complemento infinitivo (to-INF)%0A  VINF [upos="VERB"];%0A  ADJ -[xcomp]-> VINF;%0A%0A  TO [form="to"];%0A  VINF -[mark]-> TO;%0A}
requests.numerical_singular: pattern {%0A  N [upos="NOUN", feats="Number=Sing"];%0A  D [lemma="one", upos=/^(NUM|DET)$/];%0A  N -[det|nummod]-> D;%0A}
requests.passive_construction: pattern {%0A  % participio, testa della predicazione passiva%0A  V [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Part"];%0A%0A  % ausiliare be, che in ParlaMint può essere AUX o VERB%0A  A [lemma="be", upos=/^(AUX|VERB)$/];%0A  V -[aux:pass|aux]-> A;%0A%0A  % soggetto passivo%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  A2 [lemma="get", upos=/^(AUX|VERB)$/];%0A  V -[aux:pass|aux]-> A2;%0A}
requests.i-definite_np: pattern {%0A  I [form="I", upos="PRON"];%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A%0A  V -[nsubj]-> I;%0A}
requests.attribute_v-ing: pattern {%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  V -[obj]-> OBJ;%0A  V -[xcomp]-> ING;%0A%0A  ING [upos="VERB"];%0A  ING -[xcomp:subj|nsubj]-> OBJ;%0A}
requests.it_for_event: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  ADJ [upos="ADJ"];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> ADJ;%0A%0A  IT [form=/^it$/i];%0A  ADJ -[nsubj]-> IT;%0A%0A  COP [upos=/^(AUX|VERB)$/];%0A  ADJ -[cop|aux]-> COP;%0A%0A  INF [upos="VERB"];%0A  ADJ -[xcomp]-> INF;%0A%0A  TO [form=/^to$/i];%0A  INF -[mark]-> TO;%0A%0A  NP [];%0A  ADJ -[obl|nmod]-> NP;%0A%0A  FOR [form=/^for$/i];%0A  NP -[case|mark]-> FOR;%0A}
requests.you_definite_reference: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  R [];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> R;%0A%0A  YOU [lemma="you", upos="PRON"];%0A  R -[nsubj|nsubj:pass|obj|iobj|obl|nmod|nmod:poss|appos|conj]-> YOU;%0A}
requests.focus_np: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  N [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> N;%0A}%0A%0A% niente verbi/ausiliari (taglia copulari e frasi vere)%0Awithout { V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/]; }%0A%0A% taglia le citazioni editoriali tra parentesi quadre%0Awithout { LB [form="["]; }%0Awithout { RB [form="]"]; }
requests.wh-question_subject: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  R [upos="VERB"];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> R;%0A%0A  WH [lemma=/^(what|which|who|whom|whose|where|when|why|how)$/];%0A  R -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> WH;%0A%0A  Q [form="?"];%0A  R -[punct]-> Q;%0A}
requests.she_definite_reference: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  SHE [lemma="she", upos="PRON"];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> SHE;%0A}
requests.subject_attribute_adjp: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB", lemma="be"|"seem"|"become"|"remain"|"appear"|"feel"|"look"|"sound"];%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  A [upos="ADJ"];%0A  V -[xcomp]-> A;%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  V -[obj|iobj]-> O;%0A  O [];%0A}
requests.to_recipient_action: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  % RECIPIENT: "to NP"%0A  REC [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[obl|iobj]-> REC;%0A%0A  TO1 [form=/^to$/i];%0A  REC -[case|mark]-> TO1;%0A%0A  % ACTION: "to INF"%0A  INF [upos="VERB"];%0A  V -[xcomp]-> INF;%0A%0A  TO2 [form=/^to$/i];%0A  INF -[mark]-> TO2;%0A}
requests.numerical_plural: pattern {%0A  % Head plural noun%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number="Plur"];%0A%0A  % Cardinal / numeric modifier (>1)%0A  Q [upos="NUM"|"DET",%0A     lemma="two"|"three"|"four"|"five"|"six"|"seven"|"eight"|"nine"|"ten"%0A          |"eleven"|"twelve"|"thirteen"|"fourteen"|"fifteen"|"sixteen"|"seventeen"%0A          |"eighteen"|"nineteen"|"twenty"|"thirty"|"forty"|"fifty"|"sixty"|"seventy"%0A          |"eighty"|"ninety"%0A          |"hundred"|"thousand"|"million"|"billion"|"dozen"%0A  ];%0A%0A  % UD: numeral as nummod OR det of the noun%0A  N -[nummod|det]-> Q;%0A}%0A%0A% Exclude "one" explicitly (in case it appears as lemma or gets mapped oddly)%0Awithout {%0A  N -[nummod|det]-> Q1;%0A  Q1 [lemma="one"];%0A}
requests.subject_attribute_thatcl: pattern {%0A  % Predicato (nome o aggettivo) che regge la copula%0A  PRED [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|ADJ)$/];%0A%0A  % Copula "be"%0A  COP [upos="AUX", lemma="be"];%0A  PRED -[cop]-> COP;%0A%0A  % Soggetto (ATTRIBUTEE)%0A  S [];%0A  PRED -[nsubj]-> S;%0A%0A  % Clausola attributiva (that-clause)%0A  C [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  PRED -[ccomp]-> C;%0A%0A  T [upos="SCONJ", lemma="that"];%0A  C -[mark]-> T;%0A}
requests.indefinite_plural: pattern {%0A  % Head noun (plural)%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number="Plur"];%0A}%0A%0A% No determiner attached to the noun -> “indefinite” (operational definition)%0Awithout {%0A  D [deprel="det"];%0A  N -[det]-> D;%0A}
requests.change_of_state: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos="VERB"];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  O [];%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A%0A  % SOURCE: from-PP%0A  SRC [];%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> SRC;%0A  FROM [upos="ADP", form=/^from$/i];%0A  SRC -[case]-> FROM;%0A%0A  % GOAL: into-PP o to-PP%0A  GOAL [];%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> GOAL;%0A  TOINTO [upos="ADP", form=/^(to|into)$/i];%0A  GOAL -[case]-> TOINTO;%0A}
requests.more_than_type1: pattern {%0A  ADJ [upos="ADJ"];%0A  MORE [form=/^more$/i, upos="ADV"];%0A  MORE -[advmod]-> ADJ;%0A%0A  ANCH [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON|NUM)$/];%0A  ADJ -[obl|nmod]-> ANCH;%0A%0A  THAN [form=/^than$/i];%0A  ANCH -[case|mark]-> THAN;%0A}
requests.yes_no_question: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  Q [form="?"];%0A  V -[punct]-> Q;%0A%0A  AUX [lemma=/^(be|do|have|can|could|will|would|shall|should|may|might|must)$/ ,%0A      upos=/^(AUX|VERB)$/];%0A  V -[aux|cop]-> AUX;%0A%0A  AUX < S;%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  WH [lemma=/^(what|which|who|whom|whose|where|when|why|how)$/];%0A}
requests.general_quantifier_mass: pattern {%0A  % Head noun (mass-ish: usually singular NOUN)%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number="Sing"];%0A%0A  % Quantifier as determiner%0A  Q [upos="DET", lemma="enough"|"much"|"more"|"most"|"little"|"less"|"least"|"all"|"some"|"any"|"such"];%0A%0A  N -[det]-> Q;%0A}
requests.postmodifier_acl_partger: pattern {%0A  N [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"];%0A  A [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Ger"|"Part"];%0A  N -[acl]-> A;%0A}
requests.first_person_singular_present: pattern {%0A  I [form="I", upos="PRON"];%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX", Tense="Pres"];%0A%0A  V -[nsubj]-> I;%0A}
requests.it_definite_reference: pattern {%0A  I [upos="PRON", lemma="it"];%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A  V -[nsubj]-> I;%0A}%0Awithout { V -[expl]-> I; }%0A%0A% escludi extraposition: "It is ADJ/V-en that ..."%0Awithout {%0A  V -[ccomp]-> C;%0A  C [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A}
requests.alternative_coordination: pattern {%0A  X1 [];%0A  X2 [];%0A  OR [upos="CCONJ", lemma="or"];%0A%0A  X1 -[conj]-> X2;%0A  X2 -[cc]-> OR;%0A}
requests.subject_attribute_np: pattern {%0A  S [];                       % attributee (subject)%0A  V [lemma="be"];             % copula%0A  A [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];   % attribute as NP head%0A%0A  V -[nsubj]-> S;%0A  V -[xcomp|attr]-> A;%0A}
requests.realistic_condition: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  MAIN [upos="VERB"];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> MAIN;%0A%0A  COND [upos="VERB", Tense="Pres"];%0A  MAIN -[advcl]-> COND;%0A%0A  IF [lemma="if", upos="SCONJ"];%0A  COND -[mark]-> IF;%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  W [lemma="would"];%0A  MAIN -[aux]-> W;%0A}
requests.for_desired_object: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB"];%0A%0A  S [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  O [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[obl]-> O;%0A%0A  FOR [lemma="for", upos="ADP"];%0A  O -[case]-> FOR;%0A}
requests.right_dislocation: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [];%0A%0A  % una clause qualsiasi%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  PRON [upos="PRON"];%0A  V -[obj|iobj|obl|nsubj|nsubj:pass|expl|ccomp|xcomp|advcl|nmod]-> PRON;%0A%0A  TOPIC [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[dislocated]-> TOPIC;%0A}
requests.exclamative: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  R [];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> R;%0A%0A  WH [form=/^(What|what|How|how)$/];%0A%0A  % cosa modificata da WH:%0A  % - "What a NOUN"  -> det%0A  % - "How ADJ/ADV"  -> advmod%0A  T [upos=/^(NOUN|ADJ|ADV)$/];%0A  T -[det|advmod]-> WH;%0A%0A  % opzionale: "a/an" se è "What a ..."%0A  D [upos="DET", form=/^(a|an)$/];%0A  T -[det]-> D;%0A%0A  % opzionale: punteggiatura esclamativa/interrogativa (NON obbligatoria)%0A  P [form=/^[!?]$/];%0A  R -[punct]-> P;%0A}
requests.indefinite_singular: pattern {%0A  % Head noun (common noun)%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number="Sing"];%0A%0A  % Indefinite article%0A  D [upos="DET", lemma="a"|"an"];%0A%0A  % a/an is determiner of the noun%0A  N -[det]-> D;%0A}
requests.more_than_type2: pattern {%0A  H [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN)$/];%0A  MORE [form=/^more$/i];%0A  MORE -[det|amod|advmod|nummod]-> H;%0A%0A  THAN [form=/^than$/i];%0A  R2 [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON|NUM)$/];%0A  R2 -[case|mark]-> THAN;%0A}
requests.declarative_question: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  R [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> R;%0A%0A  S [];%0A  R -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  Q [upos="PUNCT", form="?"];%0A  R -[punct]-> Q;%0A%0A  % ordine dichiarativo: soggetto prima del predicato lessicale%0A  S << R;%0A}%0Awithout {%0A  OP [upos="AUX"];%0A  OP << S;%0A}%0Awithout { WH [PronType="Int"]; }%0Awithout { WH [lemma=/^(what|which|who|whom|whose|where|when|why|how)$/]; }
requests.exchange_x_for_y: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB", lemma="exchange"];%0A%0A  X [];%0A  V -[obj]-> X;%0A%0A  Y [];%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> Y;%0A%0A  FOR [form="for", upos="ADP"];%0A  Y -[case]-> FOR;%0A}
requests.resultative_attradj: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  O [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A%0A  A [upos="ADJ"];%0A  V -[xcomp]-> A;%0A}%0A%0A% evita "to be ADJ" (find O to be Adj / consider O to be Adj ecc.)%0Awithout {%0A  A -[cop]-> COP;%0A  COP [lemma="be"];%0A}%0A%0A% evita interrogative%0Awithout { Q [form="?"]; V -[punct]-> Q; }
requests.about_reference_area: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB"];%0A%0A  % Affector (subject)%0A  S [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  % Referent (about-PP)%0A  O [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[obl]-> O;%0A%0A  ABOUT [lemma="about", upos="ADP"];%0A  O -[case]-> ABOUT;%0A}
requests.more_than_type3: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  R [];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> R;%0A%0A  MORE [form=/^more$/i];%0A  H [];%0A  MORE -[advmod|amod|det|nummod]-> H;%0A%0A  X [];%0A  H -[obl|nmod|advcl|ccomp|xcomp|conj]-> X;%0A%0A  THAN [form="than"];%0A  X -[mark|case]-> THAN;%0A}
requests.monotransitive: pattern {%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/, VerbForm="Fin"];%0A  S [];%0A  O [];%0A%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A}
requests.it_cleft: pattern {%0A  F [];%0A  BE [lemma="be"];%0A  IT [lemma="it", upos="PRON"];%0A%0A  F -[cop]-> BE;%0A  F -[expl|nsubj]-> IT;%0A%0A  RC [];%0A  F -[acl:relcl]-> RC;%0A%0A  W [lemma=/^(that|who|whom|which|whose|where|when)$/];%0A  RC -[mark|nsubj|obj|obl|det]-> W;%0A}
requests.self_change_resultative_base: pattern {%0A  V [upos=VERB, lemma="become"|"get"|"grow"|"turn"|"go"|"remain"|"stay"|"fall"];%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj]-> S;%0A%0A  R [upos="ADJ"];%0A  V -[xcomp|obj]-> R;%0A}
requests.ditransitive_objtoinf: pattern {%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A%0A  % SUBJECT%0A  S [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  % RECIPIENT: NP dipendente del verbo (iobj oppure obj per alcune annotazioni)%0A  R [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[iobj|obj]-> R;%0A%0A  % to-INF: in UD tipicamente xcomp/ccomp con mark "to"%0A  X [upos="VERB"];%0A  V -[xcomp|ccomp]-> X;%0A%0A  TO [lemma="to", upos="PART"];%0A  X -[mark]-> TO;%0A}
requests.caused_change_resultative: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB", lemma="make"|"render"|"turn"|"drive"|"get"|"keep"|"leave"|"bring"|"put"];%0A  S [];%0A  O [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];%0A  R [upos="ADJ"|"NOUN"|"PROPN"];%0A%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A  V -[xcomp]-> R;%0A}
requests.they_are_willing_to: pattern {%0A  ADJ [upos="ADJ", lemma=/^(willing|keen|eager|prepared)$/];%0A%0A  BE [upos="AUX", lemma="be"];%0A  ADJ -[cop]-> BE;%0A%0A  S [upos=/^(PRON|NOUN|PROPN)$/];%0A  ADJ -[nsubj]-> S;%0A%0A  VINF [upos="VERB"];%0A  ADJ -[xcomp]-> VINF;%0A%0A  TO [form="to"];%0A  VINF -[mark]-> TO;%0A}
requests.nice_of_you: pattern {%0A  BE [lemma=/^(be|seem)$/];%0A  IT [lemma="it", upos="PRON"];%0A  BE -[nsubj]-> IT;%0A%0A  ADJ [upos="ADJ", lemma=/^(nice|good|stupid|wrong|sweet|typical|silly|clever|thoughtful|rude)$/];%0A  BE -[xcomp|cop|attr]-> ADJ;%0A%0A  % of + NP (AGENT)%0A  AGENT [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  ADJ -[obl|nmod]-> AGENT;%0A  OF [form=/^of$/i];%0A  AGENT -[case]-> OF;%0A%0A  % to-INF (ACTION)%0A  INF [upos="VERB"];%0A  ADJ -[xcomp|ccomp]-> INF;%0A  TO [form=/^to$/i];%0A  INF -[mark]-> TO;%0A}
requests.demonstrative_plural: pattern {%0A  D [upos="DET", PronType="Dem", Number="Plur"];%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number="Plur"];%0A  N -[det]-> D;%0A}
requests.general_quantifier_plural: pattern {%0A  Q [lemma="enough"|"several"|"many"|"more"|"most"|"few"|"fewer"|"fewest"|"all"|"both"|"some"|"any"];%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number=Plur];%0A  N -[det]-> Q;%0A}
requests.they_definite_reference: pattern {%0A  T [upos="PRON", lemma="they"];%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> T;%0A}
requests.wh-question_not_subject: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  R [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> R;%0A%0A  WH [form=/^(what|which|who|whom|whose|where|when|why|how)$/i];%0A  WH < R;%0A%0A  S [];%0A  R -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A  R < S;%0A%0A  Q [form="?"];%0A  R -[punct]-> Q;%0A}%0A%0Awithout { R -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> WH; }
requests.first_third_past_tense: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Fin", Tense="Past"];%0A  V -[nsubj]-> S;%0A  S [];%0A}%0A%0A% escludi soggetti plurali%0Awithout { S [Number="Plur"]; }
requests.last_name: pattern { N [upos="PROPN"]; }%0A%0A% non deve far parte di un nome multi-token%0Awithout { N -[flat|flat:name|compound|name]-> X; X [upos="PROPN"]; }%0Awithout { X -[flat|flat:name|compound|name]-> N; X [upos="PROPN"]; }%0A%0A% (facoltativo) deve essere usato come argomento/NP, non come modificatore interno%0Awithout { H []; H -[flat|flat:name|compound|name|amod|nmod]-> N; }
requests.comparative_correlative: pattern {%0A  H1 [upos="ADJ|ADV"];%0A  THE1 [upos="DET", form="the"];%0A  H1 -[det]-> THE1;%0A%0A  M1 [upos="ADV", form="more|less"];%0A  M1 -[advmod]-> H1;%0A%0A  H2 [upos="ADJ|ADV"];%0A  THE2 [upos="DET", form="the"];%0A  H2 -[det]-> THE2;%0A%0A  M2 [upos="ADV", form="more|less"];%0A  M2 -[advmod]-> H2;%0A%0A  H1 -[parataxis|advcl|conj]-> H2;%0A}
requests.topicalization: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  TOPIC [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[obj|iobj]-> TOPIC;%0A%0A  % vincolo di ordine: TOPIC prima del verbo%0A  TOPIC << V;%0A%0A  % spesso c'è la virgola dopo il topic (opzionale)%0A  C [form=","];%0A  TOPIC -[punct]-> C;%0A}
requests.with_emotion: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  E [upos="NOUN",%0A     lemma=/^(love|joy|delight|happiness|sadness|sorrow|grief|anger|rage|fury|fear|terror|anxiety|worry|concern|pride|shame|guilt|regret|remorse|sympathy|empathy|compassion|respect|admiration|disgust|hatred|hope|relief|surprise|frustration)$/];%0A%0A  W [upos="ADP", lemma="with"];%0A%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> E;%0A  E -[case]-> W;%0A}
requests.ditransitive_objnp: pattern {%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  S [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  R [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  O [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A%0A  V -[nsubj]-> S;%0A  V -[iobj]-> R;%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A}
requests.to_judge_action: pattern {%0A  V [lemma=/^(seem|appear)$/];%0A%0A  SUBJ [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[nsubj]-> SUBJ;%0A%0A  % JUDGE: "to him"%0A  J [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[obl|iobj]-> J;%0A  TO1 [form=/^to$/i];%0A  J -[case]-> TO1;%0A%0A  % ACTION: to-INF (xcomp)%0A  INF [upos="VERB"];%0A  V -[xcomp]-> INF;%0A  TO2 [form=/^to$/i];%0A  INF -[mark]-> TO2;%0A}
requests.general_postmodifier_of_adjective: pattern {%0A  A [upos="ADJ"];%0A  P [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  C [upos="ADP"];%0A%0A  A -[obl|nmod]-> P;%0A  P -[case]-> C;%0A  %0A  A << P;%0A%0A}
requests.into_causative: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  AFFECTED [];%0A  V -[obj]-> AFFECTED;%0A%0A  ACTION [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Ger"];%0A  V -[obl|xcomp|advcl]-> ACTION;%0A%0A  INTO [form="into"];%0A  ACTION -[case]-> INTO;%0A}
requests.yourself_reflexive_reference: pattern {%0A  Y [upos="PRON", form=/^yourself$/i];%0A  % non soggetto%0A}%0A%0Awithout { X []; X -[nsubj|nsubj:pass|csubj]-> Y; }%0A
requests.complex_full_name: pattern {%0A  F [upos="PROPN"];%0A  M [upos="PROPN"];%0A  L [upos="PROPN"];%0A%0A  F -[flat|flat:name|name|compound]-> M;%0A  M -[flat|flat:name|name|compound]-> L;%0A}%0A%0A% evita che sia parte di una catena più lunga (4+ token)%0Awithout { X [upos="PROPN"]; X -[flat|flat:name|name|compound]-> F; }%0Awithout { Y [upos="PROPN"]; L -[flat|flat:name|name|compound]-> Y; }
requests.relative_postmodifier: pattern {%0A  % Head noun%0A  N [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"];%0A%0A  % Head of relative clause (predicate)%0A  R [upos="VERB"|"AUX"];%0A%0A  % Relative clause must modify the noun directly%0A  N -[acl:relcl]-> R;%0A}
requests.x_is_likely_to: pattern {%0A  ADJ [upos="ADJ", lemma=/^(likely|unlikely|supposed)$/];%0A%0A  BE [lemma="be", upos=/^(AUX|VERB)$/];%0A  ADJ -[cop]-> BE;%0A%0A  S [upos=/^(PRON|NOUN|PROPN)$/];%0A  ADJ -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  VINF [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Inf"];%0A  ADJ -[xcomp]-> VINF;%0A%0A  TO [lemma="to", upos="PART"];%0A  VINF -[mark]-> TO;%0A}
requests.premodifier_of_noun: pattern {%0A  N [upos = NOUN|PROPN];%0A  M [upos = ADJ|NOUN|PROPN];%0A%0A  N -[amod|compound]-> M;%0A}
requests.subject_attribute_pp: pattern {%0A  % main predicate%0A  V [upos="VERB"];%0A%0A  % subject%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  % oblique nominal dependent (your “PP” proxy)%0A  P [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];%0A  V -[obl|obl:npmod]-> P;%0A}%0A%0A% exclude direct object (transitive)%0Awithout {%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A  O [];%0A}
requests.put_up_with: pattern {%0A  V [lemma="put", upos="VERB"];%0A%0A  % particle "up"%0A  UP [form=/^up$/i];%0A  V -[compound:prt]-> UP;%0A%0A  % "with" + NP (thing disliked)%0A  THING [upos=/^(NOUN|PROPN|PRON)$/];%0A  V -[obl]-> THING;%0A%0A  WITH [form=/^with$/i];%0A  THING -[case]-> WITH;%0A}
requests.definite_plural_np: pattern {%0A  % determiner "the"%0A  D [upos="DET", lemma="the"];%0A%0A  % head noun plural%0A  N [upos="NOUN", Number="Plur"];%0A%0A  % link%0A  N -[det]-> D;%0A}
requests.unrealistic_condition: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  MAIN [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> MAIN;%0A%0A  % ===== subordinate IF-clause =====%0A  IFCL [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  MAIN -[advcl]-> IFCL;%0A%0A  IF [form=/^if$/i];%0A  IFCL -[mark]-> IF;%0A%0A  % Past perfect in IF-clause: aux "had" + participle head%0A  HAD [lemma="have", upos="AUX"];%0A  IFCL -[aux]-> HAD;%0A  IFCL [VerbForm="Part"];%0A%0A  % ===== main clause: would/could/might have V-en =====%0A  MOD [lemma=/^(would|could|might)$/i, upos="AUX"];%0A  MAIN -[aux]-> MOD;%0A%0A  HAVE [lemma="have", upos="AUX"];%0A  MAIN -[aux]-> HAVE;%0A%0A  MAIN [VerbForm="Part"];%0A}
requests.first_name_np: pattern {%0A  N [upos="PROPN"];%0A}%0A%0A% non deve essere dentro un nome multi-token (flat/compound/name)%0Awithout { N -[flat|flat:name|compound|name]-> X; X [upos="PROPN"]; }%0Awithout { X -[flat|flat:name|compound|name]-> N; X [upos="PROPN"]; }%0A%0A% opzionale: non deve essere un modificatore nominale/aggettivale di un altro nome%0Awithout { H []; H -[amod|compound|nmod|flat|flat:name|name]-> N; }
requests.progressive: pattern {%0A  V [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Part"];%0A  B [lemma="be", upos=/^(AUX|VERB)$/];%0A%0A  V -[aux]-> B;%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  V [lemma="be"];%0A}
requests.hypothetical: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  MAIN [];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> MAIN;%0A%0A  COND [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  MAIN -[advcl]-> COND;%0A%0A  IF [lemma="if", upos=/^(SCONJ|ADP)$/];%0A  COND -[mark]-> IF;%0A}
requests.god_knows_what: pattern {%0A  AUTH [form=/^(God|god|goodness|heaven|lord)$/i];%0A  KNOW [lemma="know"];%0A  AUTH -[nsubj]-> KNOW;%0A%0A  WH [upos="PRON", PronType="Int"];%0A  KNOW -[obj|ccomp|xcomp]-> WH;%0A}
requests.he_was_brave_to_say: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  ADJ [upos="ADJ", lemma=/^(great|brave|wonderful|foolish|right|unwise|craze)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> ADJ;%0A%0A  BE [upos="AUX", lemma=/^(be|seem)$/i];%0A  ADJ -[cop]-> BE;%0A%0A  S [upos=/^(PRON|PROPN|NOUN)$/];%0A  ADJ -[nsubj]-> S;%0A%0A  INF [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Inf"];%0A  ADJ -[xcomp]-> INF;%0A%0A  TO [upos="PART", lemma="to"];%0A  INF -[mark]-> TO;%0A}
requests.ditransitive_wh-cl: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A%0A  V [upos="VERB", lemma=/^(advise|ask|inform|instruct|remind|show|teach|tell)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  % ÆFFECTOR (soggetto)%0A  A [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> A;%0A%0A  % RECIPIENT (NP oggetto “him/her/them/John/…)%0A  R [upos=/^(PRON|PROPN|NOUN)$/];%0A  V -[obj|iobj]-> R;%0A%0A  % wh-CL (subordinata interrogativa)%0A  C [upos="VERB"];%0A  V -[ccomp|xcomp]-> C;%0A%0A  % WH element nella subordinata (incl. whether)%0A  WH [lemma=/^(what|which|who|whom|whose|where|when|why|how|whether)$/];%0A%0A  % WH come dipendente della head verb della subordinata%0A  % - "what happened": WH è nsubj/obj/etc di C%0A  % - "whether to come": whether è mark di C%0A  C -[mark|nsubj|nsubj:pass|obj|iobj|obl|advmod|nmod]-> WH;%0A}
requests.him_definite_reference: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  HIM [form=/^him$/i, upos="PRON"];%0A  V -[obj|iobj|obl|nmod]-> HIM;%0A}%0A%0Awithout {%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass|csubj|csubj:pass]-> HIM;%0A}
requests.declarative_statement: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/, VerbForm="Fin"];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A}%0A%0Awithout { V [Mood="Imp"]; }
requests.controversial_tag: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A%0A  % la clausola tag come parataxis (molto comune in UD)%0A  ROOT -[parataxis]-> TAG;%0A%0A  TAG [upos="AUX"];%0A  TAG -[nsubj]-> PRON;%0A  PRON [upos="PRON"];%0A%0A  Q [form="?"];%0A  TAG -[punct]-> Q;%0A}
requests.x_is_adj_to: pattern {%0A  H [upos="ADJ"];%0A%0A  BE [lemma="be", upos=/^(AUX|VERB)$/];%0A  H -[cop]-> BE;%0A%0A  S [];%0A  H -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  VINF [upos="VERB", VerbForm="Inf"];%0A  H -[xcomp]-> VINF;%0A%0A  TO [lemma="to", upos="PART"];%0A  VINF -[mark]-> TO;%0A}
requests.self_motion: pattern {%0A  % --- MOTION VERB (lista estendibile) ---%0A  V [upos="VERB",%0A     lemma="go"|"come"|"walk"|"run"|"travel"|"move"|"drive"|"fly"|"sail"|%0A           "leave"|"arrive"|"return"|"head"|"enter"|"cross"|"reach"|"climb"|%0A           "fall"|"rise"|"step"|"march"|"advance"%0A  ];%0A%0A  % --- SUBJECT ---%0A  S [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> S;%0A%0A  % --- PP argument/adjunct of motion (obl/nmod + case=ADP) ---%0A  P [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];%0A  C [upos="ADP",%0A     lemma="to"|"into"|"onto"|"towards"|"toward"|"from"|"through"|"across"|%0A           "along"|"around"|"over"|"under"|"between"|"among"|"in"|"on"|"out"%0A  ];%0A%0A  V -[obl|nmod]-> P;%0A  P -[case]-> C;%0A}%0A%0A% exclude direct object%0Awithout {%0A  V -[obj]-> O;%0A  O [];%0A}%0A%0A% exclude indirect object%0Awithout {%0A  V -[iobj]-> I;%0A  I [];%0A}
requests.genitive_np: pattern {%0A  % C) Possessor has explicit 's marker (optional audit)%0A  R [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"];%0A  P [upos="NOUN"|"PROPN"|"PRON"];%0A  C [form="'s"|"’s"|"s'"|"s’"];%0A%0A  R -[nmod:poss]-> P;%0A  P -[case]-> C;%0A}
requests.ditransitive_that-cl: pattern {%0A  ROOT [];%0A  V [upos="VERB"];%0A  ROOT -[root]-> V;%0A%0A  AEF [];%0A  V -[nsubj|nsubj:pass]-> AEF;%0A%0A  REC [];%0A  V -[iobj|obj|obl:to]-> REC;%0A%0A  C [upos=/^(VERB|AUX)$/, VerbForm="Fin"];%0A  V -[ccomp]-> C;%0A}
